title: Money Market Fund
definition: A money market fund is a type of mutual fund that invests in low-risk, short-term debt instruments. These instruments typically mature within one year or less, offering a high degree of liquidity and capital preservation.The Manager attains the Fund’s Investment Objective principally by investing In Fixed Income Securities Investments that consist principally of fixed-income securities with a maturity of less than 36 months.
benefits: Regular Interest: Earn interest on your investment, calculated daily and allocated to your account monthly. Investment Flexibility: Easily switch your investment between different funds offered by our company to adapt to your changing goals. Fast and Easy Access: Enjoy quick and convenient withdrawals with options like M-Pesa and EFT. Zero Entry Fees: Invest without any initial charges, making it easier to get started. Ongoing Support: Receive monthly financial statements and access to valuable investment advice from our team. Automated Investing: Set up a Cash Flow Plan to automate regular transfers from your money market fund to your designated account or other investments within our company.

Investment as Collateral: Utilize your money market fund account as security for a loan (subject to approval). Multiple Access Points: Conveniently manage your account through USSD, web platform, and mobile app. Low-Risk Investment: The money market fund invests in short-term securities, minimizing exposure to market fluctuations and interest rate risk. Diversified Portfolio: Your investment is channeled into a well-diversified portfolio of low-risk assets, including: Corporate and Treasury Bonds issued by reputable institutions Fixed Deposits with a short maturity period Treasury Bills issued by the Kenyan government Investment Flexibility: There is no fixed investment term, allowing for easy access to your funds when needed. Multiple Contribution Methods: Invest conveniently through direct debit, M-Pesa, cheques, or standing orders. Free Withdrawal: Enjoy one free withdrawal per month. Additional withdrawals may incur fees.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
